title: Observation v1alpha1
description: One normalized source record inventoried by a host adapter, shaped after the Adapter Record Contract in docs/ontology/README.md §7 and the Observed Graph in docs/architecture/README.md §5.1. An ObservationSet (docs/architecture/README.md §9 HostAdapter.Observe) is an array of these. Observation never executes discovered content (init.md invariant: 'observe never writes or executes discovered assets') and must retain opaque/unknown fields losslessly (docs/product/requirements.md FR-2).

surface.description: e.g. cli, editor, app, gateway (docs/ontology/README.md §1.1, host non-equivalence rule).

concept.description: A canonical entity name from docs/ontology/README.md §1.1 (e.g. instruction, skill, mcp_server, agent, hook). Left open-string rather than a closed enum here because the ontology's entity list is still growing (see ontology/concepts/); internal/ontology is the source of truth for which concept IDs are currently known.

kind.description: docs/ontology/README.md §1.1 'source' entity: a physical file, managed policy, CLI flag, environment value, or built-in default.

opaqueVendorFields.description: docs/product/requirements.md FR-2: unknown fields and opaque assets are retained without execution.
